sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL guidelines. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Cincinnati Bengals are an NFL franchise based in Cincinnati, Ohio, founded in 1968 as a member of the American Football League. They play at Paycor Stadium and compete in the AFC North. The Bengals reached the Super Bowl in 2022, led by quarterback Joe Burrow, and are known for their distinctive striped uniform design.
